target_audience: Sales teams, sales managers, executives at Nyla Air Water organization
theme: Light theme primary (with optional dark mode toggle)

brand_identity.brand_essence: Luxury sustainable water brand with clean, elegant aesthetic emphasizing purity, innovation, and environmental responsibility
brand_identity.visual_mood: Premium minimalism with organic touches - think Apple meets sustainable luxury

typography.philosophy: Clean, professional hierarchy with subtle elegance

headings.usage: Main headings, page titles, dashboard metrics
headings.rationale: Modern geometric sans with clean lines that feel premium without being corporate. Lighter weights (300-400) for elegance, heavier weights (600-700) for impact.

subheadings.usage: Section headers, card titles, navigation labels
subheadings.rationale: Humanist sans that pairs beautifully with Outfit, adds warmth to the interface

body.usage: Body text, form labels, table data, descriptions
body.rationale: Exceptional readability for data-heavy interfaces, optimized for screens

mono.usage: IDs, timestamps, technical data, code snippets

scale.display: text-6xl md:text-7xl (60px-72px) - Splash screen, hero moments
scale.h3: text-2xl md:text-3xl (24px-30px) - Card headers, widget titles

letter_spacing.labels: tracking-wide or tracking-[0.2em] for uppercase labels

color_system.philosophy: Inspired by Nyla's water-from-air technology - combine natural blues/teals (water, sky, purity) with warm earth tones (sustainability, trust) and crisp whites (premium, clean). Avoid generic SaaS blues.

primary.name: Ocean Teal
primary.usage: Primary CTAs, active states, key metrics, progress indicators
primary.rationale: Deep teal evokes water purity and premium quality without being generic tech blue

primary_dark.name: Deep Ocean
primary_dark.rationale: Deeper teal for depth and contrast

secondary.name: Sage Green
secondary.usage: Success states, positive metrics, growth indicators
secondary.rationale: Natural green representing sustainability and growth

accent.name: Warm Sand
accent.rationale: Warm amber for organic warmth without aggression

neutral_500.name: Steel
neutral_500.rationale: Primary text color with good contrast

neutral_800.name: Midnight
neutral_800.usage: Dark mode backgrounds, maximum contrast text

error.name: Coral Red
error.usage: Error states, destructive actions, validation errors

contrast_requirements.hover_states: MUST explicitly set text color - never rely on inheritance
contrast_requirements.focus_states: MUST have HIGHER contrast than default state
contrast_requirements.text_over_images: Use text shadow or gradient overlays to ensure readability

spacing_system.philosophy: Generous spacing (2-3x typical designs) for premium feel and breathing room

component_padding.bordered_containers: MUST have internal padding (p-6 or p-8) to prevent text collision

layout_strategy.grid_system: MODE B: High Density Grid (Dashboard/Analytics focus)

alignment_rules.grid_children: Grid items MUST be direct children of grid container
alignment_rules.stretch_behavior: Override default stretch with align-items: start, add align-self: stretch to individual items
alignment_rules.optical_alignment: Add extra padding for visual centering when elements have icons

component_strategy.philosophy: Use Shadcn/UI for interactive logic, customize heavily for brand

shadcn_components.customize_heavily: All Shadcn components MUST be customized with brand colors, spacing, and typography

use_for: Custom charts (use Recharts or Shadcn Chart components)

card_usage.avoid_overuse: Don't use card component everywhere - go cardless, rectangular, dense styles
card_usage.when_to_use: Use cards for distinct, elevated content blocks
card_usage.alternatives: Flat backgrounds with 1px subtle borders, no shadows

glassmorphism.usage: Sticky headers, floating navigation, modal overlays, dropdown menus
glassmorphism.rationale: Premium feel, separates overlays from content, maintains visual hierarchy

flat_surfaces.usage: Dashboard cards, data tables, form containers

implementation.hover: Slight lift (-translate-y-1), shadow-lg, border color darkens

header_nav.top_state: bg-transparent backdrop-blur-md (if over content) or bg-white (if solid)

footer.contrast_shift: If body is light, footer should be neutral-50 or neutral-100
footer.typography: Footer links can be small, but include one large element (logo or CTA)

motion_and_interactions.philosophy: Micro-interactions for feedback and delight, not distraction

implementation.specific_properties: Use specific properties for transitions (NOT transition: all)
implementation.example: transition: transform 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease, background-color 0.2s ease
implementation.exclude_transforms: Never include transform in universal transitions (breaks animations)

hover_effects.buttons: Scale slightly (scale-105), shadow increase, color shift

loading_states.skeleton: Use Shadcn Skeleton component with pulse animation
loading_states.progress: Use Shadcn Progress component with smooth animation

accessibility.decorative_elements: Add aria-hidden='true' to purely decorative animations
accessibility.focus_management: Animations should not interfere with keyboard navigation

team_photos.description: Business team meeting - diverse professionals collaborating
Three professionals in discussion with laptops
Diverse business team in modern office

brand_visuals.description: Ripples on dark water surface - abstract water texture
brand_visuals.usage: Splash screen background, hero backgrounds, section dividers

brand_visuals.description: Water droplets on glass - purity and clarity
brand_visuals.usage: Login page background, empty states, decorative elements

image_constraints.aspect_ratios: 16:9 for hero images, 1:1 for avatars, 4:3 for cards
image_constraints.optimization: Use Unsplash's crop and quality parameters for performance

chart_types.line_charts: Sales trends, lead conversion over time
chart_types.bar_charts: Lead status distribution, team performance comparison
chart_types.area_charts: Pipeline value over time, cumulative metrics

chart_styling.legends: Horizontal below chart, or vertical right side

accessibility.color_blind_friendly: Use patterns or textures in addition to colors
accessibility.contrast: Ensure chart colors meet WCAG AA standards
accessibility.labels: Always include clear axis labels and legends

splash_screen.background: Gradient from primary to primary-dark with water ripple image overlay
splash_screen.animation: Fade in logo, subtle scale animation, fade out to login
splash_screen.text: Optional tagline: 'Sustainable Luxury Hydration' or 'Pure. Pristine. Perfection.'

login_authentication.layout: Split screen - left: brand visual (water droplets), right: form
login_authentication.form_style: Clean, minimal, glassmorphic card on right side
login_authentication.inputs: Shadcn Input components with icons (email, lock)
login_authentication.cta: Primary button 'Sign In', secondary link 'Forgot Password?'
login_authentication.branding: Small Nyla logo top-left, tagline below form

dashboard.layout: Sidebar navigation (left), main content area (right), top header
dashboard.widget_style: Flat white cards with subtle border, no shadow (shadow on hover)

leads_list.layout: Full-width table with filters and search
leads_list.filters: Status, Assigned To, Date Range, Lead Source
leads_list.search: Real-time search by name, email, company
leads_list.pagination: Bottom of table, show 25/50/100 per page
leads_list.empty_state: Friendly illustration + 'No leads yet. Add your first lead!' + CTA button

lead_detail.layout: Two-column - left: lead info, right: activity timeline
sections: Lead Status (visual pipeline with current stage highlighted)
Activity Timeline (calls, emails, meetings with timestamps)
lead_detail.actions: Edit Lead, Change Status, Schedule Follow-up, Add Note, Delete Lead
lead_detail.style: Clean cards for each section, generous spacing

add_edit_lead.style: Shadcn Form components, clean layout, clear labels

follow_up_calendar.calendar: Shadcn Calendar component, customized with brand colors
follow_up_calendar.events: Follow-up reminders shown as colored dots/badges on dates
follow_up_calendar.list_view: Upcoming follow-ups sorted by date, with lead name and action
follow_up_calendar.actions: Click date to add follow-up, click event to view/edit/complete
follow_up_calendar.filters: Filter by assigned rep, status, priority

reports_analytics.layout: Grid of report cards + detailed charts
reports: Team Performance Metrics (comparison table + bar chart)
Time to Close (average days, trend line)
reports_analytics.filters: Date range, team member, lead status
reports_analytics.style: Large charts, clear labels, interactive tooltips

team_management.layout: Table of team members + add/edit modal

user_profile_settings.profile_tab: Edit name, email, phone, avatar upload

responsive_design.mobile_first: Always design for mobile first, then scale up

breakpoint_strategy.mobile: 320px-639px - Single column, stacked layout, hamburger menu

navigation.mobile: Bottom tab bar or hamburger menu
navigation.desktop: Persistent sidebar (full width with icons + labels)

tables.tablet: Horizontal scroll with sticky first column

forms.tablet: 2-column for short inputs (first name, last name)

accessibility.color_contrast: 4.5:1 for normal text, 3:1 for large text
accessibility.keyboard_navigation: All interactive elements must be keyboard accessible
accessibility.focus_indicators: Clear, high-contrast focus rings on all interactive elements
accessibility.aria_labels: Proper ARIA labels for screen readers
accessibility.semantic_html: Use semantic HTML5 elements (nav, main, section, article, aside)
accessibility.alt_text: Descriptive alt text for all images
accessibility.form_labels: Visible labels for all form inputs
accessibility.error_messages: Clear, descriptive error messages with suggestions
accessibility.skip_links: Skip to main content link for keyboard users

testing_attributes.data_testid: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include data-testid attribute

performance.image_optimization: Use Unsplash's crop and quality parameters, lazy load images
performance.code_splitting: Lazy load routes and heavy components
performance.bundle_size: Monitor and optimize bundle size, use tree-shaking
performance.caching: Implement proper caching strategies for API calls
performance.loading_states: Always show loading states for async operations

critical_rules: DO NOT use complete transparent backgrounds in headers, overlays, or any surface with content underneath
ALWAYS explicitly set text color on hover states - never rely on inheritance
MUST add data-testid attributes to all interactive elements
Use Shadcn components for forms, dialogs, dropdowns - NOT native HTML
Customize Shadcn components heavily - strip default Vercel look
Follow generous spacing philosophy - 2-3x typical designs
Grid items MUST be direct children of grid containers
Use specific properties for transitions, NOT transition: all
Containers with borders MUST have internal padding
implementation_order: 1. Set up color system in index.css (CSS variables)
2. Import Google Fonts (Outfit, Work Sans, Inter, JetBrains Mono)
5. Create Dashboard layout (sidebar + header + main content)
6. Create Dashboard widgets (metrics, charts, activity feed)
7. Create Leads List page (table with filters)
14. Add responsive navigation (mobile hamburger, desktop sidebar)
16. Add loading states and error handling

file_structure.pages: /app/frontend/src/pages/ (SplashScreen.js, Login.js, Dashboard.js, LeadsList.js, LeadDetail.js, AddEditLead.js, FollowUpCalendar.js, Reports.js, TeamManagement.js, UserProfile.js)

anti_patterns: DO NOT center-align all content (disrupts natural reading flow)
DO NOT use universal transitions (transition: all breaks transforms)
DO NOT use AI emoji characters for icons
DO NOT use purple or teal for CTAs by default
DO NOT use Inter for headings (only body text)
DO NOT overuse card components (go flat, rectangular, dense)
DO NOT use complete transparent backgrounds without blur or scrim
pro_patterns: Layer design elements with z-index hierarchy for depth
Use glassmorphism for overlays (12-24px blur + saturation boost)
Add micro-animations to all interactive elements
Use modern button styles (pill-shaped or sharp with animations)
Use text shadows for text over images
Add hover states with explicit color changes
Use optical alignment over geometric alignment
component_reuse: Create new components matching existing style and conventions
Examine existing components before creating new ones
export_conventions: Components: Use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages: Use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
toast_notifications: Use sonner for all toast notifications
Usage: toast.success('Lead created!'), toast.error('Failed to save')

messaging: Emphasize purity, clarity, and precision (like water from air)

microcopy.empty_states: Friendly and encouraging (e.g., 'No leads yet. Let's add your first one!')
microcopy.error_messages: Clear and actionable (e.g., 'Email is required. Please enter a valid email address.')

inspiration_sources: Nyla Air Water website (nylaairwater.earth) - Brand aesthetic, colors, typography
Modern minimal dashboards - Clean interfaces, ample white space, intuitive data viz
Luxury sustainable brands - Premium feel with eco-conscious design
SaaS CRM platforms - Functional layouts, clear hierarchy, efficient workflows
key_takeaways: Use 1px borders with 10-20% opacity for subtle separation
Floating nav bars with backdrop-blur for premium feel
Ample white space and generous padding for luxury aesthetic
Color-coded status indicators for quick scanning
Card-based layouts with subtle hover effects
